entities.name: Scheduled agent
entities.context: Automated process that runs daily at 10am to monitor task status

entities.name: partial status
entities.context: Task state indicating work is incomplete

entities.name: stale task
entities.context: Task stuck in partial status for more than 3 days

relationships.context: Prompts V with questions about stale tasks
Checks for and identifies tasks stuck for > 3 days
Stale tasks are those stuck in partial status
